wrapper: bg-[var(--drivon-bg)] shadow-lg border-b border-[var(--drivon-border)] sticky top-0 z-50

nav.brand: font-display text-[1.05rem] sm:text-[1.15rem] font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-[var(--drivon-text)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-accent)] transition-colors

menu.item: text-[11px] font-body font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] transition-colors

currency.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-2 py-2 text-[11px] font-body font-medium tracking-[0.16em] uppercase text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] transition-colors
currency.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-36 bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border border-[var(--drivon-border)] rounded-sm shadow-lg z-50
currency.option: block w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-body uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] transition-colors

language.button: flex items-center space-x-1 px-2 py-2 text-[11px] font-body font-medium tracking-[0.16em] uppercase text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] transition-colors
language.dropdown: absolute right-0 mt-2 w-44 bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border border-[var(--drivon-border)] rounded-sm shadow-lg z-50
language.option: block w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-[11px] font-body uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] transition-colors

cart.count: absolute -top-1 -right-1 bg-[var(--drivon-text)] text-[var(--drivon-bg)] text-[10px] rounded-full h-5 w-5 flex items-center justify-center font-body font-medium

menu.wrapper: lg:hidden fixed left-0 right-0 bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border-b border-[var(--drivon-border)] shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out
menu.item: block py-3 px-4 text-[11px] font-body uppercase tracking-[0.16em] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] border-b border-[var(--drivon-border)] last:border-0 transition-colors

mobile.backdrop: lg:hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-[98]

cart.sidebar: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-full max-w-md bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border-l border-[var(--drivon-border)] shadow-xl z-[100] transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out
cart.iconWrapper: w-8 h-8 bg-[var(--drivon-text)] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center
cart.title: text-lg font-display font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-[var(--drivon-text)]
cart.emptyWrap: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center
cart.emptyIconWrap: w-20 h-20 bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-4 border border-[var(--drivon-border)]
cart.emptyTitle: font-display text-lg font-semibold text-[var(--drivon-text)] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide
cart.itemCard: group bg-[var(--drivon-bg)] rounded-xl border border-[var(--drivon-border)] p-4 hover:border-[var(--drivon-text)]/30 transition-all duration-200
cart.itemImage: w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded-lg border border-[var(--drivon-border)]
cart.qtyBadge: absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-5 h-5 bg-[var(--drivon-text)] text-[var(--drivon-bg)] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-body font-bold
cart.itemTitle: font-body font-semibold text-[var(--drivon-text)] text-sm leading-tight mb-1 line-clamp-2
cart.qtyWrap: flex items-center gap-1 bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] rounded-lg p-1 border border-[var(--drivon-border)]
cart.qtyBtn: w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-[var(--drivon-accent)]/20 rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors text-[var(--drivon-text)]
cart.removeBtn: p-1.5 text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded-md disabled:opacity-50 transition-all duration-200
cart.totalLabel: font-display text-lg font-semibold text-[var(--drivon-text)] uppercase tracking-wide
cart.checkoutBtn: w-full bg-[var(--drivon-text)] text-[var(--drivon-bg)] px-6 py-4 rounded-xl hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-200 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-3 font-display font-semibold text-sm uppercase tracking-wide
cart.trustWrap: flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-[var(--drivon-border)]
cart.trustItem: flex items-center gap-1 font-body text-[11px] uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-[var(--drivon-muted)]
